testcase.name: test_sos_rejects_legacy_fall_detected_key
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_build50_sos_resolve.py:135: in test_sos_rejects_legacy_fall_detected_key assert r.status_code == 422, ( E AssertionError: Legacy payload with fall_detected should be REJECTED with 422 (Pydantic extra='forbid'). Got 200: {"ok":true,"alert_id":"c0b80b19-067e-4cce-b4f2-e101650125f5","emergency_number":"911","timestamp":"2026-07-01T21:29:43.755963+00:00","member_name":"Alice FE-Test","triggered_by_name":"Alice FE-Test","family_group_id":"5e214a2f-c794-4649-bbd0-f42fbf2c32da","coordinates":{"latitude":12.34,"longitude":56.78},"fanout_mode":"background","sms_mode":"mock"} E assert 200 == 422 E + where 200 = <Response [200]>.status_code
